chunks.title: COMMUNICATION FROM THE COMMISSION
chunks.subtitle: A Union of Equality: Gender Equality Strategy 2020-2025

chunks.title: 1. Being free from violence and stereotypes

qa_pairs.question: In which four environments does the EU Gender Equality Strategy assert that everyone must be protected from gender-based harm?
qa_pairs.answer: safe in their homes, close relationships, public spaces, online

qa_pairs.question: What societal construct must be dismantled so that individuals can freely pursue their educational and professional ambitions?
What personal freedom, beyond physical safety, does the Strategy seek to guarantee for every person?

chunks.title: 1. Being free from violence and stereotypes
chunks.subtitle: Ending gender-based violence

groups.label: Legal Instruments & EU Accession
spans: EU's accession to the Istanbul Convention

qa_pairs.question: What share of women in the EU have experienced physical and/or sexual violence since the age of 15?
What proportion of women have suffered violence by an intimate partner?
What fraction of women have been sexually harassed in a work or work-related context?
Which international convention does the EU Gender Equality Strategy designate as the benchmark standard for combating violence against women?
Which Treaty provision would allow gender-based violence to be classified among the most serious cross-border offences in the EU?
What category of serious EU-wide criminal offences could gender-based violence be added to under the Commission's proposed approach?
Which two forms of gender violence mentioned in the Strategy fall under both criminal law and public health frameworks?

chunks.title: 1. Being free from violence and stereotypes
chunks.subtitle: Ending gender-based violence

groups.label: Prevention & Network Mechanisms
spans: EU network on the prevention of gender-based violence and domestic violence

groups.label: Individual
spans: women who have a health problem or disability

qa_pairs.question: Which five harmful traditional practices against women and girls does the EU Gender Equality Strategy explicitly commit to eliminating?
qa_pairs.answer: female genital mutilation, forced abortion, forced sterilisation, early and forced marriage, honour-related violence

qa_pairs.question: Which two EU instruments are proposed to strengthen support and protection for victims of gender-based violence?
qa_pairs.answer: Victims' Rights Strategy, Victims' Rights Directive

qa_pairs.question: What EU coordination mechanism is specifically devoted to sharing good practices on preventing domestic violence?
qa_pairs.answer: EU network on the prevention of gender-based violence and domestic violence

qa_pairs.question: What international labour organisation convention is referenced in the context of addressing violence and harassment in the world of work?
Which group of women facing compounded vulnerability is explicitly identified as requiring targeted support under the Strategy's victim protection measures?
qa_pairs.answer: women who have a health problem or disability

chunks.title: 1. Being free from violence and stereotypes
chunks.subtitle: Ending gender-based violence

groups.label: Online Violence & Platform Policy
spans: new framework for cooperation between internet platforms

groups.label: Trafficking & Sexual Exploitation
spans: EU strategy on the eradication of trafficking in human beings

qa_pairs.question: What form of harm disproportionately affecting women in digital environments does the Strategy specifically commit to addressing?
Which legislative instrument does the Strategy propose to regulate platform accountability for combating online violence?
What cross-border crime involving exploitation for commercial purposes does the Strategy commit to eradicating?
Which dedicated EU strategy will address the criminal phenomenon of trafficking for commercial exploitation?
qa_pairs.answer: EU strategy on the eradication of trafficking in human beings

chunks.title: 1. Being free from violence and stereotypes
chunks.subtitle: Ending gender-based violence

groups.label: Data Disaggregation Variables
spans: age, disability status, migrant status and rural-urban residence

groups.label: Individual
spans: prevalence and dynamics of violence against women

qa_pairs.question: Which four personal characteristics are identified for disaggregating GBV data to capture intersectional dimensions?
qa_pairs.answer: age, disability status, migrant status and rural-urban residence

qa_pairs.question: What EU-wide data collection instrument will be used to measure the scope of violence against women across Member States?
Which EU statistical body is designated to collect and publish gender-disaggregated data on violence?
By which year does the Strategy plan to conduct a comprehensive EU-wide survey on gender-based violence?

chunks.title: 1. Being free from violence and stereotypes
chunks.subtitle: Challenging gender stereotypes

groups.label: Cultural Sector Initiatives
spans: gender equality strategy in the audio-visual industry

groups.label: Awareness & Research Funding
spans: EU-wide communication campaign combatting gender stereotypes

qa_pairs.question: What technology does the Strategy identify as a vector through which gender biases can be perpetuated at scale?
Which EU cultural funding programme is mobilised to promote gender equality in creative and media sectors?
What sector-specific plan does the Strategy call for to address gender imbalance in film and television?
qa_pairs.answer: gender equality strategy in the audio-visual industry

qa_pairs.question: Which EU research and innovation funding programme will finance work on countering gender stereotypes?
What awareness-raising initiative will the Commission launch to address stereotypical representations across the EU?
qa_pairs.answer: EU-wide communication campaign combatting gender stereotypes

chunks.title: 1. Being free from violence and stereotypes
chunks.subtitle: Challenging gender stereotypes

groups.label: Individual
spans: citizens, equality, rights and values programme (2021-2027)

qa_pairs.question: Which four legal instruments does the Strategy call on all Member States to ratify or fully implement as a priority action?
qa_pairs.answer: Istanbul Convention, ILO Convention, Victims' Rights Directive, Child Sexual Abuse Directive

qa_pairs.question: Which EU funding programme (2021-2027) will support civil society organisations working on gender equality and anti-violence initiatives?
qa_pairs.answer: citizens, equality, rights and values programme (2021-2027)

qa_pairs.question: What type of non-governmental actor does the Strategy identify as essential for delivering and monitoring GBV interventions?

groups.label: Economic Equality Goals
spans: equal pay for work of equal value

qa_pairs.question: What four economic conditions does the Strategy set as goals for women's full participation in the EU economy?
qa_pairs.answer: economically independent, equal pay for work of equal value, equal access to finance, fair pensions

qa_pairs.question: What remuneration principle does the Strategy commit to enforcing to close the gender pay gap?
qa_pairs.answer: equal pay for work of equal value

qa_pairs.question: What retirement income goal does the Strategy set to ensure women are not penalised for career patterns shaped by caregiving?

chunks.title: 2. Thriving in a gender-equal economy
chunks.subtitle: Closing gender gaps in the labour market

qa_pairs.question: Which EU directive specifically targets the reconciliation of work and family life to improve women's labour market participation?
What forms of workplace accommodation does the Strategy promote to support workers with caring responsibilities?
qa_pairs.answer: family leave, flexible working arrangements, childcare

qa_pairs.question: Which EU economic coordination framework tracks Member States' performance on employment indicators including gender gaps?
What monitoring dashboard within the European Semester tracks social progress including gender employment outcomes?
Which Sustainable Development Goal is explicitly referenced in relation to gender equality in the EU's labour market policy?

chunks.title: 2. Thriving in a gender-equal economy
chunks.subtitle: Closing gender gaps in the labour market

groups.label: Gender Investment Gap Statistics
spans: 92% of all capital invested in Europe
venture capital and private equity firms

qa_pairs.question: What fraction of decision-makers in venture capital and private equity firms are women?
What share of all capital invested in Europe flows through firms in which women are severely underrepresented at decision-making level?
qa_pairs.answer: 92% of all capital invested in Europe

qa_pairs.question: Which EU innovation funding body will provide targeted support to women-led start-ups?
Which EU investment programme will be mobilised alongside the European Innovation Council to back female entrepreneurship?
What tax-related barrier to women's full-time employment does the Strategy commit to removing through structural reform?

chunks.title: 2. Thriving in a gender-equal economy
chunks.subtitle: Achieving equal participation across different sectors of the economy

groups.label: Women in STEM & Digital Statistics
spans: 17% of people in ICT studies and careers

qa_pairs.question: What share of people enrolled in ICT studies and careers are women?
qa_pairs.answer: 17% of people in ICT studies and careers

qa_pairs.question: What proportion of STEM graduates across the EU are women?
What percentage of AI programmers in Europe are women?
Which EU digital literacy programme specifically targets women and girls for digital skills development?
Which EU skills strategy addresses the gender gap in technical and digital education?
Which EU education framework will integrate gender equality objectives into national and cross-border learning systems?

chunks.title: 2. Thriving in a gender-equal economy
chunks.subtitle: Addressing the gender pay and pension gap

groups.label: Pay Equality Principles
spans: equal pay for equal work or work of equal value

qa_pairs.question: What remuneration principle does the Strategy commit to enforcing across all Member States to eliminate unjustified wage differences?
qa_pairs.answer: equal pay for equal work or work of equal value

qa_pairs.question: What legislative measure will the Commission propose to compel employers to disclose wage information and close the gender pay gap?
Which three structural labour market factors does the Strategy identify as underlying drivers of the persistent gender pay gap?
qa_pairs.answer: part-time work, career breaks, vertical and horizontal segregation

chunks.title: 2. Thriving in a gender-equal economy
chunks.subtitle: Addressing the gender pay and pension gap

groups.label: Pension Equality Measures
spans: care-related career breaks in occupational pension schemes

qa_pairs.question: What retirement income disparity does the Strategy commit to closing alongside the gender pay gap?
What financial mechanism will be introduced in occupational pension schemes to compensate workers for caregiving interruptions?
What specific pension scheme reform will address the negative retirement income impact of interruptions caused by care duties?
qa_pairs.answer: care-related career breaks in occupational pension schemes

qa_pairs.question: Which advisory body will examine pension adequacy from a gender equality perspective?

groups.label: Care Service Funding Instruments
spans: European Agricultural Fund for Rural Development

qa_pairs.question: What EU-level childcare provision benchmarks form the baseline for measuring Member States' progress on closing the care gap?
Which EU initiative will address child poverty and ensure equitable access to services including childcare for the most vulnerable?
Which four EU funding instruments will finance the expansion of childcare and long-term care services?
qa_pairs.answer: European Social Fund Plus, European Regional Development Fund, InvestEU programme, European Agricultural Fund for Rural Development

qa_pairs.question: Which group of families in particularly vulnerable financial situations is specifically named in the care gap section of the Strategy?
Which EU directive will be used to ensure Member States improve both access to care services and flexible working arrangements?
What two types of care provision does the Strategy prioritise to close the gender care gap across Member States?
qa_pairs.answer: early childhood education, long-term care services

qa_pairs.question: What normative field will the Commission review and potentially reform to better address gender care inequality?

groups.label: Individual
spans: led by both women and men

qa_pairs.question: What fundamental leadership principle does the EU Gender Equality Strategy seek to achieve across EU institutions and all sectors?
qa_pairs.answer: led by both women and men

chunks.title: 3. Leading equally throughout society
chunks.subtitle: Achieving gender balance in decision-making and politics

groups.label: Corporate Board Parity Instruments
spans: Directive on improving the gender balance on corporate boards
40% of non-executive members of the under-represented sex

qa_pairs.question: Which EU legislative proposal would mandate listed companies to meet a minimum gender representation threshold among non-executive board members?
qa_pairs.answer: Directive on improving the gender balance on corporate boards

qa_pairs.question: What minimum share of non-executive board seats does the proposed directive set for the under-represented sex?
qa_pairs.answer: 40% of non-executive members of the under-represented sex

qa_pairs.question: What informal barrier to women's advancement in senior positions does the Strategy explicitly name as requiring removal?
Which two EU mechanisms will be used to monitor corporate gender diversity and exchange good practices across Member States?
qa_pairs.answer: EU Platform of Diversity Charters, European Gender Diversity Index

qa_pairs.question: What type of cognitive bias does the Strategy commit to addressing in recruitment and promotion processes to achieve inclusive leadership?

chunks.title: 3. Leading equally throughout society
chunks.subtitle: Achieving gender balance in decision-making and politics

groups.label: Commission Parity Targets
spans: gender balance of 50% at all levels of its management by the end of 2024

groups.label: Individual
spans: Mutual Learning Programme in Gender Equality

qa_pairs.question: What share of MEPs elected in the 2024 European Parliament elections were women?
What was the share of women among MEPs elected in 2014, prior to the progress recorded in 2024?
What internal gender balance target has the Commission set for its management structure, and by what deadline?
qa_pairs.answer: gender balance of 50% at all levels of its management by the end of 2024

qa_pairs.question: What career advancement initiatives will the Commission implement to increase the pipeline of women into senior roles?
Which peer-learning mechanism will support Member States in sharing best practices for achieving gender balance in decision-making?
qa_pairs.answer: Mutual Learning Programme in Gender Equality

chunks.title: 3. Leading equally throughout society
chunks.subtitle: Achieving gender balance in decision-making and politics

groups.label: Corporate Board & Political Leadership
spans: Directive on improving the gender balance on corporate boards
women in decision-making positions in politics and policy-making

qa_pairs.question: Which legislative instrument does the Strategy renew its commitment to advancing women's representation in corporate governance?
qa_pairs.answer: Directive on improving the gender balance on corporate boards

qa_pairs.question: In addition to corporate boards, what other sphere does the Strategy identify as a key priority for increasing female decision-making presence?
qa_pairs.answer: women in decision-making positions in politics and policy-making

chunks.title: 4. Gender mainstreaming and an intersectional perspective in EU policies

qa_pairs.question: Which high-level Commission body is responsible for integrating gender perspectives across all EU policy areas?
Which senior Commission role carries specific accountability for advancing gender equality within the EU institutional agenda?
Which EU flagship sustainability programme does the Strategy explicitly require to be mainstreamed with a gender perspective?
Which EU climate-aligned construction programme is identified as requiring a gender equality lens in its implementation?
What type of energy-related hardship does the Strategy identify as a gendered consequence of the green transition?
What term describes women and girls displaced by climate disasters, identified as a specific intersectional concern in the Strategy?

chunks.title: 4. Gender mainstreaming and an intersectional perspective in EU policies

groups.label: Gender-Specific Health Instruments
spans: sexual and reproductive health and rights

groups.label: Inclusion Policy Instruments
spans: Action Plan on Integration and Inclusion

qa_pairs.question: Which EU cancer treatment and prevention programme must integrate a gender mainstreaming perspective?
Which EU drug policy framework (2021-2025) is identified as an area where gender mainstreaming must be applied?
What health rights must be integrated into EU health policies to ensure equal access for all women?
qa_pairs.answer: sexual and reproductive health and rights

qa_pairs.question: Which composite identity does the Strategy use to illustrate the compounded disadvantages that an intersectional approach must address?
Which community's inclusion is explicitly named alongside LGBTI+ persons as requiring an intersectional policy response?
Which EU framework will support the integration of marginalised communities, including migrant women, into mainstream services?
qa_pairs.answer: Action Plan on Integration and Inclusion

chunks.title: 5. Funding actions to make progress in gender equality in the EU

groups.label: Rights, Innovation & Migration Funding
spans: Citizens, Equality, Rights and Values Programme

qa_pairs.question: Which five EU structural and investment funds are mobilised to deliver gender equality commitments across Member States?
qa_pairs.answer: European Social Fund Plus, European Regional Development Fund, Cohesion Fund, European Maritime and Fisheries Fund, Multi-Annual Financial Framework

qa_pairs.question: Which EU rights and innovation programmes include gender equality as a cross-cutting funding priority?
qa_pairs.answer: InvestEU Programme, Creative Europe, Horizon Europe, Citizens, Equality, Rights and Values Programme, Asylum and Migration Fund

qa_pairs.question: What national-level document must Member States produce as a precondition for accessing EU structural funds related to gender equality?
What EU foundational rights instrument is embedded as a binding enabling condition for the allocation of structural funds?
What requirement must applicants submit to access certain EU research and innovation funds as part of gender mainstreaming obligations?

chunks.title: 5. Funding actions to make progress in gender equality in the EU

groups.label: Sectoral Funding Instruments
spans: European Maritime and Fisheries Fund for 2021-2027

groups.label: Budget Gender Mainstreaming
spans: gender mainstreaming in the EU budget

qa_pairs.question: Which four sectoral funding programmes covering agriculture, fisheries, education and the ocean economy must integrate gender equality?
qa_pairs.answer: Common Agricultural Policy, European Maritime and Fisheries Fund for 2021-2027, Erasmus+, blue economy

qa_pairs.question: Which EU external audit institution will scrutinise the integration of gender mainstreaming across the 2021-2027 MFF?
What budget-wide process will be reinforced to ensure gender equality is systematically tracked in EU spending?
qa_pairs.answer: gender mainstreaming in the EU budget

qa_pairs.question: What procurement approach will be promoted to ensure public contracts contribute to gender equality goals?

chunks.title: 6. Addressing gender equality and women's empowerment across the world

groups.label: EU Global Action Plans & Frameworks
spans: EU Action Plan on Human Rights and Democracy (2020-2024)

groups.label: Individual
spans: sexual and reproductive health and rights

qa_pairs.question: Which two successive EU Gender Action Plans guide the Commission's external policy on women's empowerment and gender equality?
Which EU external action plan covering 2020-2024 integrates women's rights as a cross-cutting theme in EU foreign policy?
qa_pairs.answer: EU Action Plan on Human Rights and Democracy (2020-2024)

qa_pairs.question: Which international framework ensures that gender equality is integrated into peace, security and conflict-resolution policies?
What global EU-UN partnership programme is dedicated to eliminating all forms of violence against women and girls?
What is the total budget committed to the Spotlight Initiative by the EU and its Member States?
What EU-led international campaign advocates for women's rights and gender equality globally?

chunks.title: 6. Addressing gender equality and women's empowerment across the world

qa_pairs.question: What dedicated financial facility under the EU's External Investment Plan focuses on closing the gender gap in access to financial services?
What funding amount has been allocated under the Women's Financial Inclusion Facility to expand economic opportunities for women in partner countries?
What international body will the EU engage with to mainstream gender equality considerations into global trade rules?
Which regional partnership will incorporate gender equality commitments as a cross-cutting priority in EU external relations?
What share of all new EU-funded programmes in partner countries will be required to have gender as a principal or significant objective?

chunks.title: WORKING TOGETHER FOR A GENDER-EQUAL EUROPE
